title: Pacaltsdorp man wins bakkie in national competition
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Pacaltsdorp resident Gurshwyn Sauls (36) was left speechless on Friday 27 June when he received the keys to his very first vehicle, a brand-new Hyundai bakkie, at Build it Outeniqua on the corner of Courtenay and Hope streets.


> Sauls is one of only seven winners across the country in Build it's national Win a Bakkie competition, which ran from 25 March to 10 May.


"I still can't believe it! This has opened so many doors for me," said an emotional Sauls. "It's the first vehicle I've ever owned."

To enter, Sauls simply made a purchase at Build it, wrote his details on the back of his till slip, and dropped it into the entry box.

His lucky entry has seen him driving off with more than just hardware - it's changed his life.

Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
